JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERKS JULIE WILSON/NICOLE ADAMS, REPORTER BELDON YEE. MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON NOV-04-2002 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 305, PAUL H. ALVARADO. CASE SETTLED, SENT TO PUT SETTLEMENT ON THE RECORD.

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALLI, GLORIA GALLI, BRUNO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREEN, ALAN BRUCE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1445 ALABAMA ST., SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL NOV-19-2002, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT, PLAINTIFF WAIVES UNPAID RENT AND UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES FROM AUG. 15, 2002 THROUGH NOV. 20, 2002.
